title: salvia pomifera subsp. calycina
intro: Salvia pomifera subsp. calycina, also known as Greek sage, is a plant species within the Salvia genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia pomifera subsp. calycina include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve cognitive function, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
